name: North Texas Limousine
recent_news: No web presence found; phone (817) 735-4901 at 5625 S Schilder Dr, River Oaks, TX. Appears to be a micro limo/sedan operator, not a school-bus contractor. Distinct from the unrelated 'North Texas Limo' (northtexaslimo.com) based in Denton.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Three-employee limo/sedan operator with no school-bus or SPED contract footprint; well below Summit's tuck-in threshold.

name: Western Luxury LLC
recent_news: No corroborating web presence as a school-bus or student-transport operator; phone (817) 540-0909 at 1820 Tremont Ave, Fort Worth. The 'Rodney Rasberry' web hits are an unrelated Houston musician.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro limo LLC with three employees and no evidence of school-district or SPED contracts; outside Summit's acquisition profile.

name: Kumar Transport
recent_news: California corporation filed 2007, principal office at 1112 W Fremont St, Stockton with mailing address 1395 Kimiyo St. Yelp categorizes the business under Medical Transportation; reported revenue ~$233K with 2 employees. No evidence of school-district or SPED routing contracts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-person family NEMT/medical-transport operator in Stockton; no school-bus fleet and far below Summit's tuck-in size.

name: A & G Activity Svc
recent_news: Listed as 'A & G Activity Services Inc' at 1314 W 12th St, Los Angeles; MerchantCircle/Yelp categorize the business under consulting/engineers/disabled services rather than student transportation. No evidence of school-bus operations or LAUSD contractor approval.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro disabled-services provider with no documented school-bus fleet; outside Summit's acquisition criteria.
